query:
INSERT INTO thread_subscriptions (
                room_id, thread_id, user_id, notification_level, is_muted, subscribed_ts, updated_ts
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'none', TRUE, $4, $4)
            ON CONFLICT (room_id, thread_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET
                is_muted = TRUE,
                updated_ts = EXCLUDED.updated_ts
            RETURNING id as "id!", room_id as "room_id!", thread_id as "thread_id!", user_id as "user_id!", notification_level as "notification_level!", is_muted as "is_muted!", is_pinned as "is_pinned!", subscribed_ts as "subscribed_ts!", updated_ts as "updated_ts!"
